text:
Created attachment 227101
Update to 10.4.19

All versions are security releases and contain important security fixes - read the corresponding security advisory here:

https://typo3.org/security/advisory/typo3-core-sa-2021-013


For details about the releases, please visit the following website:

https://typo3.org/article/typo3-1132-10419-9529-8742-7653-security-releases-published
